actions.leaf_title: Extend CLI router to support temperature domain

revised.title: Register temperature under the affine dispatch path in the router
revised.content:
First attempt wired temperature into the factor dispatch table; the affine handler never ran. Register the domain with the affine dispatcher and assert the handler type in the router tests.

Files: unitconv/cli/router.py, tests/test_router.py

Acceptance criteria:
- temperature dispatches to the affine handler (assert handler type)
- factor domains unaffected (regression assertions stay green)

Test expectations: handler-type assertion added to tests/test_router.py

actions.rationale: Under-cap failure with a precise diagnosis; the capped sibling is already escalated and out of bounds.
